sub_mechanisms: M_1: K site points p_1...p_K in embedding space (per-expert anchor)
M_2: nearest-site routing rule per token
M_4: site update via expert performance feedback
stripped_llm_application: Place K expert anchor points in embedding space; route each token to its nearest anchor; for tokens near cell boundaries, route softly to multiple anchors; periodically update anchor positions by expert performance feedback.
novelty_claim_stripped: Semantic Routing (2502.10928), Guiding Experts (2505.18586), Stratified Manifold MoE (2502.13577) cluster experts on semantic regions; Voronoi candidate uses EXPLICIT site-point + nearest-site geometric rule, distinct from learned soft-routing.
